name: Coffeyville Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Coffeyville Recreation Center in Coffeyville, KS! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Cornerstone Family Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at Cornerstone Family Fitness in Independence, KS! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
